title: Convenient Crafting
description: A mod to prevent softlocking in biomes like deserts, and to add reverse recipes.
body:
This mod adds ways to un- craft things, oasis, greenhouses, and more to come! Surviving in desert biomes becomes much easier with this mod, adding ways to craft essential resources like wood with sticks. Reverse crafting to cobwebs, wool, etc. is now possible! Turn rotten flesh into a viable food source or even leather. 

**This mod is in it's early stages of development, so feedback is appreciated!**
